label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Alice is dancing with at the end of the song. So there are these five main dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They each start with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now, there are a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one to keep track. First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So before this, Dave is with Melissa, and Bob is with Patrick. After switching, Dave will now be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me note that down: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Rodrigo Second switch: Claire and Dave switch partners. So Claire is currently with Ophelia, and Dave is with Patrick. After switching, Claire will be with Patrick, and Dave will be with Ophelia. Updating the list: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Alice is with Jamie, Eve is with Rodrigo. After switching, Alice will be with Rodrigo, and Eve will be with Jamie. - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Jamie Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Patrick, Eve is with Jamie. After switching, Claire will be with Jamie, and Eve will be with Patrick. - Alice: Rodrigo - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Patrick Fifth switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Alice is with Rodrigo, Eve is with Patrick. After switching, Alice will be with Patrick, and Eve will be with Rodrigo. So now the final pairings are: - Alice: Patrick - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Jamie - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo The question asks who Alice is dancing with at the end. The options are (B) Patrick. So the answer should be B. Wait, let me double-check each step to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First switch: Dave (Melissa) and Bob (Patrick) swap. So Dave-Patrick, Bob-Melissa. Correct. Second switch: Claire (Ophelia) and Dave (Patrick) swap. So Claire-Patrick, Dave-Ophelia. Correct. Third switch: Eve (Rodrigo) and Alice (Jamie) swap. Alice-Rodrigo, Eve-Jamie. Correct. Fourth switch: Claire (Patrick) and Eve (Jamie)
